_comment: Captioned icon catalog for the Q&A image-enrichment routing prototype. Each entry maps a REAL open-icon name (Lucide MIT / Tabler MIT / Material Symbols Apache-2.0) to two caption variants so we can ABLATE caption quality (skeptic Risk #3): `name_caption` ~= what bare Iconify aliases give you; `rich_caption` = LLM-style synonym/tag enrichment. The recolor script (icons/recolor.mjs) pulls the same `lucide` names from the installed `lucide-static` package and brand-recolors them. `concept` is the human label used by the eval to score precision@1.
